After cleaning out mud, sand and water from our little restaurant, crawling behind things, throwing away thousand of dollars in food, if I can still keep my humor, I'm doing OK! But regardless, as our little island will be evacuating tomorrow mid day, I will most definitely prepare MUCH better for Milton. I suggest everyone do the same. Anna Maria Island looks like a war zone. Some, no most, have lost everything they have, many ground level homes could not afford to carry flood insurance. We live just off island, I am so very grateful we have a cool home, ok maybe a few missing food tiles and pool screens, but nothing like these people have lost, not even close. Waste management is doing their best to get the hstreets cleared of all the furniture, appliances, walls counters, cabinets from the streets in time so that if this one hits us, there will be little to no debris to fly around. If you store photos or important papers in your garage or down close to the floor, get them up four or five feet. Holmes Beach police have pallets upon pallets of drinking water, pick some up, it will only go to waste if you don't. Denis, if you are ever out on our little island stop into Minnie's Beach Cafe' in downtown Holmes Beach for the best breakfast on the island on me, for you and your family! You are our man, as I am surely older than you are, you'd best not retire until I am gone to that great Breafast restaurant in the sky!

Denis Phillips I'm a tourist in Orlando from Ireland and I'm meant to be here until Saturday. Can you give me any insight on what to do? Is it worth staying here until it passes or do I change my flight and just go home today/tomorrow?
If I were you, I would head home by Monday.

It really depends on the storm track and where you are staying. Orlando isn’t going to get storm surge. Wind will weaken a bit between landfall and Orlando. If you’re in a ground level unit then you could see flooding depending on where exactly in Orlando you are, so knowing if you’re in a flood zone would be helpful. If you’re staying in a mobile home AirBnB then you’ll be more at risk than if you’re staying in a fourth floor hotel room.
